rag_rules: When fixing type mismatches in AGREE contracts, ensure left and right sides of binary expressions have identical types.
Only use assign statements for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Validate that all AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers and declared helpers from the same annex.
Ensure scalar type declarations in AGREE use int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified or unresolved types.
For guarantee expressions, relate visible outputs to visible inputs without referencing implementation-only paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks with proper scope for component types vs implementations.
Generated AGREE code must not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the input AADL model.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix type errors; instead, correct the expression or remove invalid clauses.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes for guarantee statements.
